title: 8 Leg Spider Robot by Theo Jansen Linkage
description: 8-legged walking robot driven by a single DC motor via Theo Jansen linkage mechanism, laser-cut acrylic frame, controlled by L298N + Arduino Uno for forward/turn manoeuvres.
objective: Walk on flat surface; 8-leg Theo Jansen gait with 45° phase offsets; single DC motor; steering via differential speed; BOM < ₹1500.
constraints: 6 V battery; single DC motor; laser-cut acrylic links; 3 mm link thickness; Arduino Uno optional speed control.
design_element_titles: DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control
L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Module

element_usage_notes.Klann / Theo-Jansen Leg Linkage Mechanis: 8 legs, 4 per side, 45° phase offset per leg pair; single shared crank shaft; 3 mm acrylic links.
element_usage_notes.L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Module: Two L298N channels drive left/right motor sets for differential steering.
